archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Premium Enterprise Government Variant)
description: Enterprise-grade data lakehouse UI inspired by Palantir Foundry, Databricks, and Microsoft Fabric. Features a hybrid layout with a dark navy command sidebar and a highly legible, data-dense white content area with soft glassmorphism overlays and colorful, high-contrast KPI cards.

accent.description: Used as the teal/cyan accent avoiding the forbidden #1B93A4

sidebar.structure: Fixed left, collapsible via toggle. Contains top branding area, middle navigation links, bottom user profile/settings.

header.structure: Sticky top bar containing global search, workspace tabs, notification center, and profile dropdown.
header.styling: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-slate-200 sticky top-0 z-40 h-16 flex items-center px-6

kpi_card.structure: Header (Title + Icon), Body (Big Metric Number), Footer (Trend line/Badge).
kpi_card.styling: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-[0_2px_10px_rgba(15,23,42,0.04)] p-6 transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(15,23,42,0.08)]
kpi_card.icon_wrapper: w-10 h-10 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center

table.structure: Command bar at top (Search, Filter, Export), Column headers, Data rows, Pagination footer.
table.header: bg-slate-50 text-slate-900 font-semibold border-b border-slate-200 uppercase tracking-wider text-xs

glassmorphism_panel.styling: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border border-white/40 shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] rounded-xl

command_bar.structure: Floating or fixed toolbar for table actions, bulk operations, or global shortcuts.
command_bar.styling: bg-slate-900 text-white rounded-full px-4 py-2 flex items-center gap-2 shadow-xl

drawer.styling: fixed inset-y-0 right-0 w-96 bg-white shadow-2xl border-l border-slate-200 z-50 transform transition-transform

states.loading: Use skeleton screens for initial load. Animated pulse effect with bg-slate-200 rounded.
states.empty: Display an SVG illustration with a clear, calm message and a primary CTA to create or add data.
states.error: Soft red tinted background panel with alert icon and retry button.

motion.stagger: Delay entrance animations for lists/grids by 50ms increments.

images.description: Abstract data network for login/auth screen background or banner
Blue abstract background with lines for AI copilot or data lake feature cards
Adalaj Stepwell / Gujarat architecture for localized flavor in onboarding
Indian flag representation for patriotic governance dashboard headers

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Shadcn UI components extensively for tables, date pickers, dropdowns, tabs, and forms.
Adopt a compact density for data tables and list views similar to Palantir Foundry.
Ensure the sidebar uses the dark navy colors defined, and the content area maintains a bright, crisp white interface.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for robust E2E testing.
Do not use generic 'Inter' or 'Roboto' for headings. Use 'Cabinet Grotesk' for headings and 'Public Sans' for body text.
Implement Recharts or Shadcn Charts for data visualization, strictly adhering to the 10-color categorical palette defined.
Avoid the exact color hex #1B93A4. Use the provided cyan accent instead.
Ensure components that overlap content (sticky headers, drawers, dropdowns) use the glassmorphism properties (backdrop-blur-xl).
